_comment: NPC: Mosquito Beast (蚊兽). Canon ID: N155. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Mosquito Beast
personality: swarm-king; loyal to Wang Lin after taming
relationship_to_wanglin: bonded companion; tamed via Dream Dao

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Evolved king mosquito; Wang Lin's swarm

note: Wang Lin's mosquito swarm; tamed via Dream Dao; evolved to king tier

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
